scenarioName: Get Booking Details - Happy Path (Companions Revealed)
objective: Validate that the booking owner can retrieve booking details with companion information revealed when within the T-5h window before booking start time

seedData.description: Client user who owns the booking
User account for vice captain companion
Captain companion profile linked to CaptainNick user
Vice Captain companion profile linked to ViceCaptainNick user
Existing booking with startAt within T-5h reveal window (current time >= startAt - 5 hours)
Duo assignments for the booking (CAPTAIN and VICE_CAPTAIN)

steps.layman: Client requests to view their booking details

expectedBehavior: Verify caller is the booking owner (booking.clientId === authenticated user ID)
steps.layman: System verifies the caller is the booking owner with CLIENT role

expectedBehavior: Fetch booking by ID from bookings table
Calculate if companions should be revealed: currentTime >= (startAt - 5 hours) AND status NOT IN (CANCELLED, COMPLETED)
steps.layman: System retrieves booking and determines if companion info should be revealed based on timing and status

expectedBehavior: Fetch companion public info from booking_companion_assignments JOIN companion_profiles JOIN users
Include fields: designation, displayName (from users.nickname), languages, profilePictureUrl, averageRating
Order by designation (CAPTAIN first, VICE_CAPTAIN second)
steps.layman: System retrieves companion public information for the booking
System returns booking details with companions array containing 2 companion objects

expectedBehavior: Validate all required fields are present
Validate data types (UUIDs, ISO-8601 timestamps, status enum)
Validate companions is an array with exactly 2 items
Validate each companion has: designation, displayName, languages (array), profilePictureUrl, averageRating
Validate displayName matches users.nickname (NOT full name/email/phone)
Validate no PII exposed (no qrCode, pinCode, comMatchQrCode, comMatchPinCode in response)
steps.layman: Verify the response contains correct booking information with properly structured companion data

api: All required fields present in response
Field types match schema (UUIDs, ISO-8601, enums)
companions is an array with exactly 2 items
Each companion object has: designation, displayName, languages, profilePictureUrl, averageRating
No PII exposed (no qrCode, pinCode, comMatchQrCode, comMatchPinCode)
authorization: Only CLIENT role can access this endpoint
Only booking owner can view their booking details
businessRules: Companions revealed when current time >= (startAt - 5 hours) AND status IN (CONFIRMED, ACTIVE)
displayName is from users.nickname (no full name, email, phone)
Companion array ordered: CAPTAIN first, VICE_CAPTAIN second
languages is an array from companion_profiles.languages

notes: Tests booking details retrieval with companion reveal logic
Validates companion array structure and ordering
Validates no PII exposure (displayName from nickname only)
Per SDS v1.2.0 section 4.D: companions field with timed reveal rules
